message:
fix(fr-runtime): apply memtoull suffix parsing to all memory configs [bd-frankenredis-ky4n follow-up]

Extends the memtoull suffix support added in 0c7f12b to the
remaining memory-typed CONFIG SET parameters:
  - repl-backlog-size
  - proto-max-bulk-len
  - client-query-buffer-limit
  - client-output-buffer-limit

Previously they used parse_i64_arg which rejected '100mb' /
'1gb' etc. Switched all four to parse_memory_size_arg so they
accept the same suffix forms as maxmemory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
